metadata.description: Agent skills split by failure mode: discipline, methods, and judgment.

plugins.name: discipline
plugins.description: Behavioral correctives that keep coding agents from guessing, skipping checks, bulldozing work, and hiding failures.

plugins.name: methods
plugins.description: Expert procedures the agent invokes to do a task well, where the untrained default is to improvise.

plugins.name: judgment
plugins.description: Evaluators the agent invokes to review and decide well, where the untrained default is to miss what matters.
